strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room007 - the agent's office.
What do you want?
Yup. Talent agent to the stars, that's me. What's this about? Time is money, and you're wasting mine.
What do I care about some dead girl. Beat it why don't you?
Heck no! I'm a very private man! Don't bother me until you know who the dead girl is.
Are you Maury Wan?
I'm investigating the murder of a Jane Doe in the desert a few days ago.
Mind if I take a look around?
Okay, we'll be back.
What do you want?
Freebird? She's one of my up and coming stars! Oh, man, this will cost me millions!
You should talk to that "lump" she calls a boyfriend, Lawrence Garvey. He was always jealous of her success.
Look - celebrity bad girls, they get all the attention. But Freebird was so squeaky clean - she didn't drink, didn't get in trouble, and didn't make headlines!
What, you think I have something to do with this? Look all you want, you won't find anything.
It seemed like a good idea at the time. I could just see the headlines - "Good girl gone bad!" I would have made millions!
You want the shirt on my back, too? Go ahead, take 'em.
Freebird Reynolds is dead. Her body was found in a burned car in the desert.
Who would want to hurt Freebird?
Why were your fingerprints on a liquor bottle found at the scene?
Mind if I take a look around?
So you planted the bottle in her car?
I'll need to collect your shoes for evidence.
Thank you for your time.
What would you like help with?
Without a search warrant, we need the owner's permission. Have you talked to Mr. Wan?
He's demanding proof that he or his clients are involved in this. Let's go analyze our evidence and see if we can find any proof.
Can I search this location?
He seems not to be very cooperative.
I agree. Let's go process the evidence I have.
What would you like help with?
Talk to Mr. Wan. Our victim is one of his clients.
Can I search the location now?
I'll go do that.
What would you like help with?
I'll agree he's not pleasant, but he gave us permission to search the place. Take advantage of it.
I think there's more evidence.
I think we're done here. Time to move on.
Mr. Wan doesn't seem very cooperative.
Are we finished here?
I'll keep looking for more evidence.
Let's get out of here.
